title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explores how logarithmic transformations of images reveal hidden structure in M.C. Escher's Print Gallery through the lens of complex analysis. The video demonstrates conformal maps and the complex exponential as tools for understanding both artistic self-similarity and mathematical deep structure.
